prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年（理科）最低位次约19450名，2024年（理科）约22097名，2025年改为新高考物理类后最低位次约56116名。考试模式切换导致位次体系重构，2025年物理 类基准位次约56116名；该校在云南省物理类招生计划：2023年5人，2024年7人，2025年62人（考试模式改革后大幅增加），2026年计划61人，较2025年 微降1人，缩招约1.6%，对竞争影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西藏大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名约第195名（2025年），近年排名在190-200名区间波动，整体层 次处于211中后段；抖音综合热度排名第30位，评价为"较热"，短视频曝光量较高，反映报考关注度有所上升；声誉文件中无该校明显负面或正面舆情记录，投 档异常文件中亦无该校断档信号，整体声誉平稳；第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，学科实力相对薄弱，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在滇招生专业以师范类、医学类、理工类为主，社会整体热度平稳；云南省2026年普通高考考生总数约377900人，较2025年（历史类+物理类合计约285688人）大幅增长约3 2.3%，物理类估算约229400人，竞争显著加剧；西藏大学位于西藏拉萨，距云南较远，高原环境对部分考生存在地域偏好 阻力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年物理类基准位次约56116名、2026年招生计划微缩1.6%、云南省考生总数大幅增长约32%导致竞争 加剧、抖音热度较热反映关注度上升等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年小幅上移（更难进）。预测最低位次约55973名，区间55473–56473名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023 (Science), the minimum rank was approximately 19,450; in 2024 (Science), approximately 22,097; in 2025, after switching to the new Gaokao Physics Category, the minimum rank was approximately 56,116. The change in exam mode led to a restructuring of the ranking system, with the baseline rank for the 2025 Physics Category being approximately 56,116. The university's enrollment plan in Yunnan Province for the Physics Category: 5 students in 2023, 7 in 2024, 62 in 2025 (a significant increase after the exam reform), and 61 planned for 2026, a slight decrease of 1 student from 2025, a reduction of about 1.6%, which has limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking is approximately 195th (2025), fluctuating in the 190-200 range in recent years, placing it in the middle-to-lower tier of Project 211 universities. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 30th, rated as 'relatively hot,' with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention from applicants. There are no significant negative or positive public opinion records in the reputation file, and no signs of admission gaps in the abnormal admission file, indicating overall stable reputation. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no disciplines rated A- or above, indicating relatively weak academic strength, which limits appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's majors recruited in Yunnan are mainly in teacher training, medicine, and engineering, with overall stable social popularity. The total number of ordinary Gaokao examinees in Yunnan Province in 2026 is approximately 377,900, a significant increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025 (total of History Category and Physics Category approximately 285,688), with the Physics Category estimated at about 229,400, leading to intensified competition. Tibet University is located in Lhasa, Tibet, far from Yunnan, and the plateau environment may pose regional preference resistance for some applicants.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 Physics Category baseline rank of approximately 56,116, the slight 1.6% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the significant 32% increase in total examinees in Yunnan Province leading to intensified competition, and the relatively hot Douyin popularity reflecting increased attention, it is predicted that the minimum admission rank for the 2026 Physics Category will slightly rise (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum rank is approximately 55,973, with a range of 55,473–56,473.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For ranks within the predicted range of 55,473–56,473, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the rank is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., below 55,473), focus on competitive majors like Oral Medicine and Computer Science and Technology; if the rank is near the upper limit, prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. Majors with an additional Tibetan language exam require attention to extra application conditions.

历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025 (History Category), the minimum ranking is approximately 12,232, which is the only reference historical data; there are no admission records for Arts/History Category in 2023-2024; the university's enrollment plan in Yunnan Province for History Category: 18 students in 2025, 19 students planned for 2026, an increase of 1 student compared to 2025, an expansion of about 5.6%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking is approximately 195th (2025), with recent rankings fluctuating in the 190-200 range, placing it in the middle-to-late segment of 211 universities; its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 30th, rated as "relatively hot", with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention from applicants; there are no significant negative or positive public opinion records about the university in reputation documents, and no signs of admission gaps in the abnormal filing documents, indicating overall stable reputation; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no disciplines rated A- or above, indicating relatively weak academic strength, which limits appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The university's majors in History Category in Yunnan are mainly teacher training (Chinese Language and Literature, History, Ideological and Political Education), language (English, Translation), and finance and economics (Taxation, Finance), with overall stable social popularity; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Yunnan Province in 2026 is approximately 377,900, a significant increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025, with History Category estimated at about 148,500, significantly intensifying competition. Tibet University is located in Lhasa, Tibet, far from Yunnan, and the plateau environment poses regional preference resistance for some candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 History Category baseline ranking of approximately 12,232, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of 5.6%, the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of candidates in Yunnan Province leading to intensified competition, and the Douyin popularity being relatively hot reflecting increased attention, the expansion effect is insufficient to offset the competitive pressure from candidate growth. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly rise (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 12,840, with a range of 12,340 to 13,340.
